roadmap.title: Scalable System Design Architecture
roadmap.reason: You have some experience with System Design, but an advanced refresher is recommended to meet JD parity.

roadmap.title: Mastering FastAPI & Async Python
roadmap.reason: The Job Description explicitly requires FastAPI, which were not detected in your resume. Note: Mastery of FastAPI relies on understanding Python Advanced, REST APIs.

roadmap.title: Kubernetes and Container Orchestration
roadmap.reason: The Job Description explicitly requires Kubernetes, which were not detected in your resume. Note: Mastery of Kubernetes relies on understanding Docker.

roadmap.title: Modern CI/CD Pipelines with GitHub Actions
roadmap.reason: The Job Description explicitly requires CI/CD, which were not detected in your resume. Note: Mastery of CI/CD relies on understanding Docker, Linux CLI.
